class TestSWAP {
  public static void main(String argv[]){
    int a = 1, b = 2; 
    System.out.println(((a) == (1)) && ((b) == (2))); 
    {
      int _T0 = a; 
      a = (b); 
      b = (_T0); 
      }; 
    System.out.println(((a) == (2)) && ((b) == (1))); 
    }
  }
